name: demo_band_led
_doc: DEMO C of the Slice-5 interaction demo — LIVE BAND -> LED (Liam's Q4, reusing Slice 7 visi-sonor). A signal band is injected via the per-frame frame (the demo drives it from a time oscillator / a keypress so Liam sees the colour change live) and read by an Input SOURCE. A BRAIN of Compare(gt threshold) + Select maps the band energy to a WARM colour when high and a COOL colour when low. The WorldAction fires device.set_led with the mapped { r, g, b, addr }; the mounted renderer tints a small on-screen LED indicator so the colour is VISIBLE. device.* is registered by the host at boot (DeviceActions.register_device_ops); a host with no LED still runs this same arrangement, device.set_led falling through the unknown-op declared-no-op. Same node types + wiring as arrangements/visisonor_loop.json — this is the demo instance driven by the live oscillator.
